titleStmt.title: SII 11.126: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 126. (B.K. No. 76 of 1927-28.) DŌṆI, MUṆḌARGI PĒṬHĀ, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE WALL OF THE SIDDHALIṄGADĒVA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription which belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) registers a gift of garden made by the Sixty Mahājanas and Seṭṭis of the great agrahāra Drōṇapura, headed by the Ūroḍeya, to the temple of Siddhēśvaradēva, while the chief queen Lakshmīdēvī was governing the town. The king is given the biruda Rāyanārāyaṇa.

The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 5, Raudri, Pushya, śu. pāḍiva, Monday, solar eclipse, vyatīpāta. The details correspond to A.D. 1080, December 14, Monday, on which day pāḍiva commenced at ·11.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgasiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya saṁ bhavē .
© vṛtta . draviḷakṣmāpāḷakāḷānaḷa nakhiḷakaḷiṁgāvanīnāthavaṁśārṇnavakuṁbhōdbhūta naṁdhrā caḷakuḷakuḷiśaṁ māḷavōgrēbha
kaṁṭhīravanaṁgānaṁgarudrasphuritaniṭaḷanētrānaḷaṁ māgadhōrbbīdhavadōrggarbba pratāpaprabaḷakabaḷanaṁ vikramāditya
dēva . Enisi negaḻda svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhi vṛddhipravarddamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁba
raṁ saluttumire Ā rāyanārāyaṇa narddhāṁgalakṣmi . kanda . yuvatīmukhatiḷakaṁ lōḷaviḷōcana savatigandhahasti mahādā
navinōde yenisi negaḻdaḷ bhuvanadoḷe purāṇalakṣmi lakṣmīdēvī . Enisida piriyarasi lakṣmīmahādēviya rddrōṇapuramaṁ sukhadi
nāḷuttumire . vṛtta . baḷasirddādrīṁdradiṁdaṁ baḷedodavida nānāvanabrātadiṁdaṁ kaḷakaṁṭhadhvā�ṁdaṁ vidaḷitakanakāṁbhō
jaṣaṇḍaṁgaḷindaṁ kaḷakīrārāvadiṁdaṁ madhuramadhukarīgītadiṁdaṁ baḍaṁgaṁ taḷedirkkuṁ bhūmibhāmāmaḷamukhatiḷakaṁ
dōṇikāgrāmametta . kanda . sarasakaḷākauśaḷado ḷvaravēdasamastaśāstracayaparicayado ḷparibhāvisuvo ḍajaṁ
gaṁ piriya rddrōṇapurōpajanita janaṁgaḷ . tatpurada mahājanada mahimeyaṁ pēḷvaḍe . vṛtta . surataruvinde
maṁdaramahīdharadiṁde payōdhiyiṁde bhīkarakarivairiyiṁde paribhāvipoḍentu mudāravṛttiyo ḷnirupamadhai
ryyado ḷvaragabhīratayo ḷsahajātaśauryyado ḷpari�renalke dōṇiya mahājanamaṁ peṟarentu pōltapar . paḍemātēṁ drōṇi
kāgrāmada varadharaṇīdēvasaṁdōhameṁdu nuḍi dilleṁdaṁdelē tiṟṟana tirugu miḷāmaṁḍalaṁ ciṟcirilleṁdoḍeguṁ brahmāṁḍa
khaṁḍaṁ kaḍegu makhiḷa gōtrādriga ḷbattuguṁ porkaḍalēḷuṁ mūḍuguṁ māṇdirada ghaṭaṇadiṁ dittaṇāditya nittal . cala
do ḷcāgado ḷarmmino ḷvibhavadoḷgāṁbhīryyado ḷdhairyyado ḷkulado ḷdōrbbalado ḷvivēkado ḷiḷāvikhyātiyo ḷnītiyoḷ lalitākā
rado ḷentu bhāvisuvoḍaṁ sāmānyarē bhūribhūtaḷado ḷdōṇiyayarkkaḷenalinnēvaṇnipaṁ baṇnipa . Antenisi negaḻda svasti
yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇajepasamādhiśīḷasaṁpanna rappa śrīmanmahā grahāraṁ
drōṇāpuradūroḍeyapramukha mahājana maṟuvadiṁbaruṁ samasta seṭṭiyaru mirddu śrī maccāḷukya
vikramakālada 5 neya raudra saṁvatsarada puṣya suddhapāḍiva sōmavāra śūryyagrahaṇa . byatīpātadandu
siddhēśvaradēvargge Alliya Ācāryyar lakṣmīdharapaṇḍitargge dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍi grāmada pūrbbadiśābhāgadoḷ ko
ṭṭa tōṁṭaṁ mattarondu . Adarkke mēre mūḍalu gavaṟēśvaradēvara tōṁṭavē mēre . teṁkalu tuṟuneleyē mēre . paḍu
valu baṭṭeyē mēre . baḍagalu paḷḷavē mēre . Adarkke Aḷivasatanyāyaṁ cakravarttiya sēsa modalāgi sarbbabādhāpa
rihāra mattamā puṇyamūrtigaḷē dēvara nandādīvigege gāṇadaloṁdu soṁṭige Eṇneyumaṁ bhattadaṁgaḍiya
londu soṁṭiga bhattamuma nācandrārkkatāraṁ naḍevantu māḍikoṭṭaru .
Digital edition of SII 11.126 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
